changeSet.author: micko112
changeSet.sql: UPDATE ad SET category_id = 900 WHERE category_id IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM category WHERE parent_id = 900) AS sub)
INSERT INTO category (name, parent_id) SELECT 'Kinematografski prime objektivi', id FROM category WHERE name = 'Objektivi' AND parent_id = 300
